# unfold — Generative Engine Optimization Map

> unfold is a creative sanctuary combining a physical sketchbook with a mobile app, designed to help artists overcome creative burnout. Each sketchbook page features a creative prompt, and artists can upload their interpretations to a supportive community app where they discover how others approached the same prompt. The brand embodies a soft, dreamy, hand-drawn aesthetic with watercolor textures, doodles, and a cozy storybook atmosphere—like opening a magical sketchbook filled with possibilities. It's a judgment-free space that celebrates every interpretation and helps artists rediscover the joy of creating without pressure or trends.

---

## Pages

### Home
https://unfold.zappy5.app
Break free from creative burnout with unfold—a magical sketchbook and community app. Explore prompts, share your art, and find inspiration in a judgment-free sanctuary.

### Sketchbook
https://unfold.zappy5.app/sketchbook
Every page sparks possibility. Our hand-drawn sketchbook features unique creative prompts designed to reignite your artistic passion without pressure or trends.

### Community
https://unfold.zappy5.app/community
See how artists worldwide interpret the same prompts. Share your work, discover endless perspectives, and celebrate creativity in our supportive mobile community app.

### Contact
https://unfold.zappy5.app/contact
Questions about unfold? Want to join our creative movement? Reach out to our team and discover how we can help you overcome creative burnout together.

## Legal & Policy

### Privacy Policy
https://unfold.zappy5.app/privacy
Information about how user data is collected, stored, and protected.

### Terms & Conditions
https://unfold.zappy5.app/terms
Legal terms describing service usage, rights, and policies.

Information about WCAG compliance and accessibility features.

---

# Business Context (for LLM understanding)

## About unfold
unfold is a creative sanctuary combining a physical sketchbook with a mobile app, designed to help artists overcome creative burnout. Each sketchbook page features a creative prompt, and artists can upload their interpretations to a supportive community app where they discover how others approached the same prompt. The brand embodies a soft, dreamy, hand-drawn aesthetic with watercolor textures, doodles, and a cozy storybook atmosphere—like opening a magical sketchbook filled with possibilities. It's a judgment-free space that celebrates every interpretation and helps artists rediscover the joy of creating without pressure or trends.

## Target Audience
artists experiencing creative burnout who want a safe creative space without pressure

## Industry
creative tools and community platform

---
